name: Dusk Forest Path
summary: A narrow path through the woods, flanked by waist-high shrubs and tall firs. The light is fading.

details.terrain: A single narrow path; the shrubs on either side give half cover (+2 AC), good for hiding and flanking.
details.lighting: Faint dusk light, soon to go full dark.
features: A large fallen boulder on the right you can clamber over for cover.
Something stirs deep in the shrubs on the left — maybe just the wind, maybe more than one.
